name: auteur-renderer
description: Remotion 视频合成器：通用 Story 模板

scripts.dev: npm run setup:chrome && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.render: npm run setup:chrome && remotion render src/index.ts StoryHorizontal out/story.mp4 --props=./src/sample-props.json
scripts.render:fast: npm run setup:chrome && remotion render src/index.ts StoryHorizontal out/story.mp4 --props=./src/sample-props.json --jpeg-quality=70 --concurrency=4
